zh.lifeSummary: Teresa de Girón是Gonzalo Roiz Giron Matordomus domini regis和Sancha Rodriguez de Lara的女兒，於1185年出生在西班牙。她和Ruy o Rodrigo González de Cevallos e Hita Comendador O. Santiago Uclés至少有3個兒子和5個女兒。她去世於1243年3月31日在她的家鄉享年58歲。

zh-hans.Escalante, Santander, Cantabria, España: 西班牙坎塔布里亞埃斯卡蘭特
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Teresa de Girón是Gonzalo Roiz Giron Matordomus domini regis和Sancha Rodriguez de Lara的女儿，于1185年出生在西班牙。她和Ruy o Rodrigo González de Cevallos e Hita Comendador O. Santiago Uclés至少有3个儿子和5个女儿。她去世于1243年3月31日在她的家乡享年58岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Girón
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Carlos, Juan, Luis, Julio, Francisco, Jesus, Manuel, Ana, Jorge, Miguel, Mario.
French: from a pet form of the personal name Gire, a variant of Gilles .

variants.name: Jiron
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Juan, Armando, Carlota, Claudio, Guillermo, Orlando, Rafael, Sergio, Ada Luz, Ana Silvia, Angelina, Candido.
Hispanic (mainly Nicaragua; Jirón): altered form of Spanish Girón (see Giron ).

variants.name: Geron
meanings: French (Géron): from the personal name Gero, Gerone, a short form of ancient Germanic names formed with the element gār, gēr ‘spear, lance’, as for example Gérard (see Gerard ).
English (Lancashire): of Norman origin, from the personal name Geron of ancient Germanic origin, a cognate of 1 above.

nameMeanings.name: Teresa
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   Theresa .  In the English-speaking world the name is often chosen in this spelling by Roman Catholics, with particular reference to the Spanish saint, Teresa of Ávila (  Teresa Cepeda de Ahumada ,  1515–82 ).

variants.name: Theresa
meanings: Of problematic origin. The name seems to have been first used in Spain and Portugal, and, according to tradition, was the name of the wife of St Paulinus of Nola, who spent most of his life in Spain; she was said to have originated (and to have derived her name) from the Greek island of Thēra. However, this story is neither factually nor etymologically confirmed.

variants.name: Teresia
meanings: Of problematic origin. The name seems to have been first used in Spain and Portugal, and, according to tradition, was the name of the wife of St Paulinus of Nola, who spent most of his life in Spain; she was said to have originated (and to have derived her name) from the Greek island of Thēra. However, this story is neither factually nor etymologically confirmed.

historicEvents.description: The Christian territory controlled the Kingdoms of Aragon, Navarre, and Castile.

en.lifeSummary: Teresa de Girón was born in 1185, in Spain as the daughter of Gonzalo Roiz Giron Matordomus domini regis and Sancha Rodriguez de Lara. She had at least 3 sons and 5 daughters with Ruy o Rodrigo González de Cevallos e Hita Comendador O. Santiago Uclés. She died on 31 March 1243, in her hometown, at the age of 58.

fr.lifeSummary: Teresa de Girón est née en 1185, à Espagne, fille de Gonzalo Roiz Giron Matordomus domini regis et Sancha Rodriguez de Lara. Elle a eu au moins 3 fils et 5 filles avec Ruy o Rodrigo González de Cevallos e Hita Comendador O. Santiago Uclés. Elle est décédée le 31 mars 1243, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 58 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Teresa de Girón wurde 1185 in Spanien, als Tochter von Gonzalo Roiz Giron Matordomus domini regis und Sancha Rodriguez de Lara geboren. Sie hatte mit Ruy o Rodrigo González de Cevallos e Hita Comendador O. Santiago Uclés mindestens 3 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb am 31. März 1243 im Alter von 58 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Teresa de Girón è nata il nel 1185 nel Spagna come figlia di Gonzalo Roiz Giron Matordomus domini regis e Sancha Rodriguez de Lara. Lei avuto almeno 3 figli e 5 figlie con Ruy o Rodrigo González de Cevallos e Hita Comendador O. Santiago Uclés. Morì il 31 marzo 1243, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 58 anni.

ja.Escalante, Cantabria, Spain: スペインカンタブリアエスカラント
ja.Escalante, Santander, Cantabria, España: スペインカンタブリアエスカラント
ja.lifeSummary: Teresa de Girónは1185年にスペインでGonzalo Roiz Giron Matordomus domini regisとSancha Rodriguez de Laraの娘として生まれた。彼女はRuy o Rodrigo González de Cevallos e Hita Comendador O. Santiago Uclésとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と5人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1243年3月31日に故郷で58歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Teresa de Girón(은)는 1185년 스페인에서 Gonzalo Roiz Giron Matordomus domini regis(와)과 Sancha Rodriguez de Lara의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 Ruy o Rodrigo González de Cevallos e Hita Comendador O. Santiago Uclés(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1243년 3월 31일 그녀의 고향에서 58세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Teresa de Girón nasceu em 1185, em Espanha filha de Gonzalo Roiz Giron Matordomus domini regis e Sancha Rodriguez de Lara. Ela teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 5 filhas com Ruy o Rodrigo González de Cevallos e Hita Comendador O. Santiago Uclés. Ela faleceu em 31 de março de 1243, em sua cidade natal, com 58 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Teresa de Girón родилась в 1185 г. в местности Испания. Её родителей звали Gonzalo Roiz Giron Matordomus domini regis и Sancha Rodriguez de Lara. У неё было по крайней мере 3 сына и 5 дочерей от Ruy o Rodrigo González de Cevallos e Hita Comendador O. Santiago Uclés. Она умерла 31 марта 1243 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 58 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Teresa de Girón nació en 1185, en España como hija de Gonzalo Roiz Giron Matordomus domini regis y Sancha Rodriguez de Lara. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 5 hijas con Ruy o Rodrigo González de Cevallos e Hita Comendador O. Santiago Uclés. Murió el 31 de marzo de 1243, en su pueblo, a la edad de 58 años.
